product: Crop disease detection model deployed on agricultural drones
primary_challenge: Model accuracy degrades in low-light and high-humidity conditions. Needs edge optimization for Jetson deployment.
deployment_target: edge - DJI Matrice drone with Jetson Orin NX
twelve_month_goal: Deploy across 500 farms in 3 countries with real-time disease detection at under 100ms latency
investor_narrative: First mover in drone-based crop disease detection with proprietary field data from 40,000 acres
